summary: Iteration 242: Complete testing of Phone+PIN Login and Role-Based Onboarding Carousel features. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login page Email/Phone tab switcher working, Phone login form with country selector/phone/PIN inputs verified, Registration page optional PIN field verified, Onboarding carousel verified with admin user (3 cards, progress dots, skip/next/back buttons, 'Open Dashboard' final button).

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) triggered after multiple test logins - expected behavior but affects test suite

routing_issues.issue: ProfileSettingsPage.jsx exists with PIN management section (data-testid=pin-management-section) but is NOT routed in App.js. Component is inaccessible to users.
routing_issues.suggested_fix: Add route in App.js under /account routes: <Route path='settings' element={<ProfileSettingsPage />} />

profile_settings_pin_management.note: ProfileSettingsPage.jsx exists with PIN management section but is not accessible via any route in App.js

action_items: Add ProfileSettingsPage route to App.js under /account routes to make PIN management accessible to customers
critical_code_review_comments: Phone+PIN login correctly normalizes phone numbers using normalize_phone() function
PIN validation enforces 4-6 digits and requires current password verification
Onboarding carousel uses backend onboarding_completed flag as source of truth
OnboardingGate component correctly checks /api/auth/me and shows wizard if onboarding_completed=false
ROLE_CARDS in OnboardingWizard.jsx has appropriate cards for 7+ roles (customer, vendor, partner, affiliate, sales, sales_manager, finance_manager, admin)
ProfileSettingsPage.jsx has complete PIN management UI but needs to be routed in App.js

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all UI elements verified except ProfileSettingsPage routing)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing seed data. Test user has phone_normalized=+255712345678 and pin_hash set.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 242 verified Phone+PIN Login and Onboarding Carousel features. (1) All backend auth endpoints working - email+password and phone+PIN login both functional. (2) /api/auth/me returns onboarding_completed and has_pin fields. (3) /api/auth/set-pin validates PIN format (4-6 digits) and requires current password. (4) Onboarding carousel appears for users with onboarding_completed=false, has role-specific cards, progress dots, skip/next/back buttons. (5) ProfileSettingsPage.jsx exists with PIN management but is NOT routed in App.js - needs to be added. (6) Rate limiting (429) may occur after multiple test logins - wait 60+ seconds between test runs.
